# Bofu Chen (陳伯符) — Portfolio & Blog

> Personal portfolio and blog of Bofu Chen (陳伯符), co-founder and CEO of Numbers Protocol.
> Software Engineer, AI Builder, and Open-Source Contributor based in Taiwan.

## About

Bofu Chen is an entrepreneur and engineer focused on digital provenance, AI, and open-source development. He co-founded Numbers Protocol, building tools for digital media authenticity using blockchain and cryptographic technologies. Previously, he served as a Technical Engineering Lead at Canonical (Ubuntu).

## Site Structure

- [Homepage](https://bafu.github.io): Portfolio overview — experience, projects, talks, awards, and contact
- [Homepage (繁體中文)](https://bafu.github.io/zh-TW): 繁體中文版作品集
- [Homepage (日本語)](https://bafu.github.io/ja): 日本語版ポートフォリオ
- [Blog](https://bafu.github.io/blog): Technical articles on AI, web3, and open source
- [Blog (繁體中文)](https://bafu.github.io/zh-TW/blog): 繁體中文技術部落格
- [Blog (日本語)](https://bafu.github.io/ja/blog): 日本語テクニカルブログ

## Languages

This site is available in three languages:
- English (default, no URL prefix): https://bafu.github.io
- 繁體中文 (Traditional Chinese): https://bafu.github.io/zh-TW
- 日本語 (Japanese): https://bafu.github.io/ja

## Blog Series

### Building TAE-AI: A Founder's Journal
A weekly series documenting how a 10-person startup built its own sovereign AI system from scratch. Written by Bofu Chen, covering real development timelines, architecture decisions, usage data, and lessons learned. TAE-AI stands for Transparent, Auditable, Explainable AI.

## Blog Posts

### Two Months of Sovereign AI — What Actually Changed at Our Company?
- English: https://bafu.github.io/blog/what-changed-after-sovereign-ai
- 繁體中文: https://bafu.github.io/zh-TW/blog/what-changed-after-sovereign-ai
- 日本語: https://bafu.github.io/ja/blog/what-changed-after-sovereign-ai
- Topics: TAE-AI, enterprise AI, sovereign AI, AI agent, AI governance, founder's journal
- Published: 2026-04-18
- Summary: Real data from two months with Omni — 420 conversations, 7,471 messages, 4,171 autonomous health checks. Non-engineering departments account for 24.5% of human messages. AI autonomous activity exceeds human activity at 62:38. Omni contributed 61.9% of March commits and 88.9% of PRs.

### We Decided to Build. But What Kind of System Did We Actually Need?
- English: https://bafu.github.io/blog/what-kind-of-system
- 繁體中文: https://bafu.github.io/zh-TW/blog/what-kind-of-system
- 日本語: https://bafu.github.io/ja/blog/what-kind-of-system
- Topics: TAE-AI, enterprise AI, sovereign AI, founder's journal
- Published: 2026-04-11
- Summary: From zero to working prototype in four days — Lovable for frontend, Claude Code for backend, founder making architecture decisions. Three key definitions: Claude Code as blueprint but web-first, per-conversation workspace isolation, and separating "make it alive" from "make it good."

### Why Our 10-Person Startup Built Its Own AI Instead of Using ChatGPT
- English: https://bafu.github.io/blog/why-build-your-own-ai
- 繁體中文: https://bafu.github.io/zh-TW/blog/why-build-your-own-ai
- 日本語: https://bafu.github.io/ja/blog/why-build-your-own-ai
- Topics: TAE-AI, enterprise AI, data sovereignty, founder's journal
- Published: 2026-04-04
- Summary: Data sovereignty, AI sovereignty, unified gateway, knowledge accumulation — why a tech founder chose to build in-house AI, and what it actually costs.

### Hello World — First Post
- English: https://bafu.github.io/blog/hello-world
- 繁體中文: https://bafu.github.io/zh-TW/blog/hello-world
- Topics: meta, React, Markdown
- Published: 2026-02-28

## Notable Projects

- [Nit](https://github.com/numbersprotocol/nit): Onchain provenance toolkit (like Git for digital media)
- [ERC-7053](https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-7053): Ethereum standard for interoperable digital media indexing
- [Capture Cam](https://github.com/numbersprotocol/capture-lite): First web3 camera app with onchain provenance and C2PA
- [BerryNet](https://github.com/DT42/BerryNet): Deep learning gateway for edge/IoT devices
- [AIKEA](https://github.com/dt42/aikea): AI knowledge engine architecture
